name: Run void and comp review huddle
description: Review avoidable voids and comps in a short huddle so the venue closes the loop on loss incidents instead of absorbing them as normal service cost.
source_ref: core-v2: tighten control loops by making avoidable loss visible, reviewed, and owned
entry_conditions: Voids or comps are rising and the venue cannot explain which are avoidable.
A leader can review incidents with enough detail to assign corrective actions.
contraindications: Do not use the huddle to blame staff without identifying process causes.
Do not review losses if the venue will not track whether follow-up actions were completed.
proof_of_completion: A short review cadence exists for avoidable voids and comps.
Each reviewed incident has a likely cause and named follow-up action.
The venue can distinguish repeatable process losses from true one-off exceptions.
